name: activity-feed
title: Activity Feed
author: Parable
description: A vertical activity timeline: markers on a mask-faded gradient rail, each with an actor, a highlighted action target, a relative timestamp, and optional detail; rows stagger-fade in on mount and the newest carries a soft live pulse. Under prefers-reduced-motion the feed paints once, fully legible, with no stagger, rail-draw, or pulse.
